data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (major)
Brainstorm integration specifics:
(a) Scorer is invoked in Phase 3 Step 1, BEFORE ticket creation — agent reads the scorer prompt, assesses value/effort, determines priority
(b) The inline priority guidance block (P0-P1: unblocks..., P2: default..., P3-P4: nice-to-have) is REPLACED by a reference to the scorer
(c) Scorer is read inline as prompt guidance (not dispatched as sub-agent) — same pattern as the complexity evaluator prompt
(d) Existing brainstorm approval gate tests do not need updates since they test Phase 2 gates, not Phase 3 priority assignment
